subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that thou hast drunk from the ocean of divine knowledge and, through the grace of God - exalted be His glory - attained unto that which most of the people of earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله از بحر عرفان آشامیدی و بعنایت حق جل جلاله بانچه اکثر رجال ارض از آن
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
